hooks.command: python3 -c "import json,sys,re; d=json.load(sys.stdin); c=d.get('tool_input',{}).get('command',''); ops=('git commit','git merge ','git pull','git rebase --continue'); [print('bicameral: git write-op detected — call bicameral.link_commit(commit_hash=\'HEAD\') now to sync the decision ledger') for _ in [1] if any(op in c for op in ops)]"
